# HXA.io Documentation

> HXA.io is a user-centric Building Operating System for commercial buildings. It connects Microsoft 365, room/resource booking, workplace management, access, displays, and building automation.

## Key Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://docs.hxa.io/getting-started/)
- [HXA Room Booking](https://docs.hxa.io/appendix/product-descriptions/app-description-roombooking/)
- [HXA Sparo](https://docs.hxa.io/)
- [Licensing](https://docs.hxa.io/license/purchase-license/)
- [Languages](https://docs.hxa.io/appendix/languages/)

## Products

HXA.io includes HXA Sparo, HXA Room Booking, HXA Room Board, HXA Displays, and HXA Door Connect for Microsoft Teams.

## Target Users

IT administrators, facility managers, workplace managers, building operators, Microsoft 365 administrators, and enterprise customers.
